title: pulmonaria affinis
intro: Pulmonaria affinis, also known as Lungwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, Pulmonaria affinis has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Pulmonaria affinis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in ointments and creams to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
